Scripts for testing FFT algorithms, generating and parsing activity data, and plotting statistics.


## Files
- **[fft.py](fft.py.md)**: Python script for testing a real-valued FFT algorithm on step-tracking data with visualization.
- **[gen_data_logging_blob.py](gen_data_logging_blob.py.md)**: Generates a sample health activity data blob with command line options for debugging.
- **[parse_activity_data_logging_records.py](parse_activity_data_logging_records.py.md)**: Parses and converts Pebble activity data logging records from binary or log files into C format for testing.
- **[plot_magnitudes.py](plot_magnitudes.py.md)**: Plots statistics from a CSV file generated by the test_kraepelin_algorithm unit test.
- **[plot_stats.py](plot_stats.py.md)**: Plots statistics from a CSV file generated by the test_kraepelin_algorithm unit test.
